description_long: This is a high-top athletic sneaker featuring a classic color-blocked design with red, white, and black panels. The upper is primarily constructed from smooth leather, with perforations on the toe box for breathability and a padded black collar for ankle support. A large black Nike Swoosh logo is prominently displayed on both sides, while the lateral side also features a black Air Jordan Wings logo. The shoe is fastened with black laces in a standard criss-cross pattern, and the tongue is white with a red and white Nike Air logo patch. The midsole is off-white, and the outsole is red, providing a visually striking contrast and a durable base for urban environments.
description: A high-top sneaker with red, white, and black leather panels, black laces, and prominent Nike and Air Jordan branding. The shoe features a padded collar, perforated toe box, and a sturdy red outsole.
description_view_0: Side view showing the large black Nike Swoosh, red and white leather panels, and the Air Jordan Wings logo on the ankle.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the perforated white toe box, black laces, and the red and white Nike Air logo on the tongue.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with the black Swoosh and red, white, and black color blocking, but without the visible Wings logo.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the padded black collar, red heel panel, and the layered construction of the upper.
attribute_logo: Nike Swoosh on both sides in black; Air Jordan Wings logo on lateral ankle in black; Nike Air logo on tongue in white on red patch
